zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Burgh於1290年出生在英國坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green22歲，母親Lucy Bellew24歲。他和Margaret de Waldegrave至少有2個兒子。他去世於1334年在英國坎布利其爾布勒 格林享年44歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾布勒 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Burgh于1290年出生在英国坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green22岁，母亲Lucy Bellew24岁。他和Margaret de Waldegrave至少有2个儿子。他去世于1334年在英国坎布利其爾布勒 格林享年44岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾布勒 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Burgh was born in 1290, in Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green, was 22 and his mother, Lucy Bellew, was 24. He had at least 2 sons with Margaret de Waldegrave. He died in 1334, in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Burgh est né en 1290, à Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lucy Bellew, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Margaret de Waldegrave. Il est décédé en 1334, à Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Burgh 1290 in Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green 22 und seine Mutter Lucy Bellew 24. Er hatte mit Margaret de Waldegrave mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1334 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Burgh è nato il nel 1290 nel Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Bellew, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Margaret de Waldegrave. Morì nel 1334, nel Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Burghが1290年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアストウ クウム クイで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Greenは22歳，母Lucy Bellewは24歳であった。彼はMargaret de Waldegraveとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1334年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアブロウ グレンで44歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアブロウ グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Burgh(이)가 1290년 영국 캄브리지실르 스타우 쿠 크이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Bellew(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Margaret de Waldegrave(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1334년 영국 캄브리지실르 버루그h 그린에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 버루그h 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Burgh nasceu em 1290, em Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Bellew, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Margaret de Waldegrave. Ele faleceu em 1334, em Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Burgh родился в 1290 г. в местности стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Bellew, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Margaret de Waldegrave. Он умер в 1334 г. в местности бурроую грин, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности бурроую грин, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Burgh nació en 1290, en Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Burgh , Lord of Borough Green, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lucy Bellew, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Margaret de Waldegrave. Murió en 1334, en Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
